rules.rule_text:
rule shell_names
{
	meta:
		author = "@patrickrolsen"
		version = "0.3"
		data = "08/19/2014"
		reference = "N/A"

	strings:
		$s1 = "faim.php"
		$s2 = "css5.php"
		$s3 = "groanea.php"
		$s4 = "siler.php"
		$s5 = "w.php" fullword
		$s6 = "atom-conf.php"
		$s7 = "405.php"
		$s8 = "pack2.php"
		$s9 = "r57shell.php"
		$s10 = "shell.php" fullword
		$s11 = "dra.php"
		$s12 = "lol.php"
		$s13 = "php-backdoor.php"
		$s14 = "aspxspy.aspx"
		$s15 = "c99.php"
		$s16 = "c99shell.php"
		$s17 = "fx29sh.php"
		$s18 = "azrailphp.php"
		$s19 = "CmdAsp.asp"
		$s20 = "dingen.php"
		$s21 = "entrika.php"

	condition:
		not uint16( 0 ) == 0x5A4D and any of ( $s* )
}
